notes: DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp W8A8C8 quantized inference (hidden=7168, kv_lora_rank=512, q_lora_rank=1536, num_attention_heads=128, n_routed_experts=256, n_shared_experts=1, num_experts_per_tok=8, first_k_dense_replace=3, moe_intermediate_size=2048). Trace captures one model step covering: prev-step spec-token verification (ops 0-12), main-model embedding (TP=16, ops 13-22), 3 dense decoder layers (layers 0-2, ops 23-128), 3 MoE decoder layers (layers 3-5, ops 129-254), main shared_head_norm + lm_head (ops 255-262), then a loop of 3 MTP iterations (next_n=3) — each iter contains spec-token verify + weight-prep + embed_prep + enorm + hnorm + eh_proj + input_layernorm + MoE decoder body + shared_head_norm + lm_head (ops 263-541), then final sampling (542-547). Step 15 auto-selected (largest stable group of 10 steps; warmup step 10 was outlier with 100851us, step 15 closest to median 18048us). Layer 0 (dense) uses a standalone RmsNorm for input_layernorm because past_residual is None at layer 0; layers 1+ use InplaceAddRmsNorm fusing the prior residual. Per skill D.1.1 exception, dense representative = layer 1 (ops 61-94), MoE representative = layer 3 (ops 129-170), MTP representative = iter 0 (ops 308-367). Self-attention is DeepseekIndexerAttention.forward_absorb (MLA absorbed with kv_b weight + LightningIndexer sparse-KV indexing + KvQuantSparseFlashAttention). Comm pattern reflects embed_tp=16, lmhead_tp=16, moe_tp=1 with EP-style MoeDistributeDispatch/Combine. The trace observed only 9 MlaPrologV3 (6 main + 3 MTP) rather than the full model's 61 layers — consistent with the captured rank holding only this slice (likely pipeline-parallel rank 0 with the model's first 6 main layers and the full MTP module).

embedding.name: embedding
embedding.semantic: Main-model token embedding: build pad-mask, vocab-sharded GatherV2 (embed_tp=16), ReduceScatter, rotary cos/sin lookup

children.name: embed_tokens
children.semantic: Vocab-partial token embedding GatherV2 (vocab=129280 / embed_tp=16 = 8080 per shard) + mask-out invalid positions

children.name: embed_tp_reducescatter
children.semantic: Reduce-scatter across embed_tp=16 to get full hidden per-token

main_final_norm.name: main_final_norm
main_final_norm.semantic: End-of-main-model fused residual + RMSNorm (DeepseekV3Model.norm). Fuses prior layer's residual add and final normalization before main lm_head.

lm_head.name: lm_head
lm_head.semantic: Shared lm_head projection to vocab. Called 4× per step: once after main forward, then once after each of 3 MTP iterations. Implementation: AllGather (lmhead_tp=16) → vocab-partial MatMul → AllToAll → reshape to full vocab → Cast to fp32

children.name: tp_alltoall
children.semantic: AllToAll across lmhead_tp=16 to assemble full vocab

children.name: logits_cast
children.semantic: Cast logits to fp32 for argmax stability

DeepseekV3DecoderLayer_dense.name: DeepseekV3DecoderLayer_dense
DeepseekV3DecoderLayer_dense.semantic: Main-model dense decoder layer (first_k_dense_replace=3). Structure: InplaceAddRmsNorm (input_layernorm + prior residual) → DeepseekIndexerAttention.forward_absorb (MLA prolog + Lightning sparse indexer + KvQuantSparseFA + W_kv_b absorb + o_proj) → AddRmsNormDynamicQuant (residual + post_attn_norm + quant for next QuantMM) → DeepseekV3DenseMLP (gate_up QuantMM → SwiGLU → down QuantMM). Representative = layer 1 (ops 61-94); layer 0 differs only in input_layernorm (standalone RmsNorm at op 27).

children.name: input_layernorm
children.semantic: Fused residual add + pre-attention RMSNorm (DeepseekV3RMSNorm.forward(hidden, past_residual))

children.name: self_attn
children.semantic: DeepseekIndexerAttention.forward_absorb — MLA with W_kv_b absorbed + Lightning sparse indexer + KvQuantSparseFA

children.name: mla_prolog
children.semantic: Fused MLA prolog (MlaPrologV3): q_a_proj → q_a_layernorm → q_b_proj absorbed → kv_a_proj → kv_a_layernorm → rotary on Q_rope and compressed K_rope → cache write

kernels.shape_semantic: input [B*T=4, hidden=7168] → Q_nope_abs [B*T=4, H=128, kv_rank=512], Q_rope [B*T=4, H=128, D_rope=64], KV_cache_entry [block=520, page=128, 1, kv_rank+D_rope=576]
kernels.name: MlaPrologV3

op_data.name: MlaPrologV3
op_data.shape_semantic: input [B*T=4, hidden=7168] → Q_nope_abs [B*T=4, H=128, kv_rank=512], Q_rope [B*T=4, H=128, D_rope=64], KV_cache_entry [block=520, page=128, 1, kv_rank+D_rope=576]

children.name: indexer
children.semantic: Lightning sparse indexer: builds top-k key indices for sparse attention (Indexer.forward); produces topk_indices used by KvQuantSparseFlashAttention

kernels.semantic: Indexer q_b: project q_lora_rank to indexer query dim
kernels.name: QuantBatchMatmulV3

kernels.shape_semantic: [B=1, T=4, H_idx=64, D_idx_half=64] ⊕ [B=1, T=4, H_idx=64, D_idx_half=64] → [B=1, T=4, H_idx=64, D_idx=128]
kernels.name: ConcatV2

kernels.semantic: LightningIndexerQuant: compute sparse top-k indices for KV
kernels.shape_semantic: Q[B*T=4, H_idx=64, D_idx=128] × K_cache[block=520, page=128, 1, D_idx=128] → topk_indices[B*T=4, 1, k=2048]
kernels.name: LightningIndexerQuant

op_data.name: QuantBatchMatmulV3
op_data.semantic: Indexer q_b: project q_lora_rank to indexer query dim

op_data.name: ConcatV2
op_data.shape_semantic: [B=1, T=4, H_idx=64, D_idx_half=64] ⊕ [B=1, T=4, H_idx=64, D_idx_half=64] → [B=1, T=4, H_idx=64, D_idx=128]

op_data.name: LightningIndexerQuant
op_data.semantic: LightningIndexerQuant: compute sparse top-k indices for KV
op_data.shape_semantic: Q[B*T=4, H_idx=64, D_idx=128] × K_cache[block=520, page=128, 1, D_idx=128] → topk_indices[B*T=4, 1, k=2048]

children.name: attn_core
children.semantic: KvQuantSparseFlashAttention using indexer top-k indices: Q × sparse_K × sparse_V (compressed via W_kv_b absorption, output in kv_rank=512 dim)

kernels.semantic: Concat Q_nope_abs with Q_rope for FA input
kernels.shape_semantic: Q_nope_abs[B*T=4, H=128, kv_rank=512] ⊕ Q_rope[B*T=4, H=128, D_rope=64] → Q_full[B*T=4, H=128, kv_rank+D_rope=576]
kernels.name: ConcatV2

op_data.name: ConcatV2
op_data.semantic: Concat Q_nope_abs with Q_rope for FA input
op_data.shape_semantic: Q_nope_abs[B*T=4, H=128, kv_rank=512] ⊕ Q_rope[B*T=4, H=128, D_rope=64] → Q_full[B*T=4, H=128, kv_rank+D_rope=576]

children.name: kv_b_absorb
children.semantic: Inverse-absorb W_v_b: project attention output from kv_rank back to v_head_dim (BatchMatMul over heads). Implements the absorbed kv_b_proj on the output side.

kernels.semantic: Transpose attention output to BMM layout
kernels.name: Transpose

op_data.name: Transpose
op_data.semantic: Transpose attention output to BMM layout

children.name: o_proj
children.semantic: Output projection (RowParallelLinear concat→hidden, oproj_tp=1 here for prefill_benchmark.yaml)

children.name: post_attention_layernorm
children.semantic: Fused residual add + RMSNorm + dynamic-quant for next QuantMM (AddRmsNormDynamicQuant). Dense-MLP path requires quantized input, so quant is fused in.

kernels.shape_semantic: [B=1, T=4, hidden=7168] + [B=1, T=4, hidden=7168] → [B=1, T=4, hidden=7168] (+ quantized output + per-row scale)
kernels.name: AddRmsNormDynamicQuant

op_data.name: AddRmsNormDynamicQuant
op_data.shape_semantic: [B=1, T=4, hidden=7168] + [B=1, T=4, hidden=7168] → [B=1, T=4, hidden=7168] (+ quantized output + per-row scale)

children.name: mlp
children.semantic: DeepseekV3DenseMLP: SwiGLU MLP (gate_up_proj 7168→2*ffn=36864 fused; SwiGLU activation 36864→18432; down_proj 18432→7168)

children.name: gate_up_proj
children.semantic: Fused gate+up projection (output split for SwiGLU)

children.name: activation
children.semantic: SwiGLU activation fused with dequant + requant (DequantSwigluQuant)

DeepseekV3DecoderLayer_moe.name: DeepseekV3DecoderLayer_moe
DeepseekV3DecoderLayer_moe.semantic: Main-model MoE decoder layer (layer_idx ≥ first_k_dense_replace=3). Same MLA self-attn pattern as dense; MLP replaced by DeepseekV3MoE (gate routing + shared_expert + dispatch + routed_experts + combine). post_attention_layernorm uses AddRmsNormCast (no quant fusion — MoE forks into separate quant paths for shared and dispatch). Representative = layer 3 (ops 129-170).

kernels.shape_semantic: input [B*T=4, hidden=7168] → Q_nope_abs [B*T=4, H=128, kv_rank=512], Q_rope [B*T=4, H=128, D_rope=64], KV_cache_entry [block=520, page=128, 1, 576]
kernels.name: MlaPrologV3

op_data.name: MlaPrologV3
op_data.shape_semantic: input [B*T=4, hidden=7168] → Q_nope_abs [B*T=4, H=128, kv_rank=512], Q_rope [B*T=4, H=128, D_rope=64], KV_cache_entry [block=520, page=128, 1, 576]

kernels.shape_semantic: Q[B*T=4, H_idx=64, D_idx=128] × K_cache[block=520, page=128, 1, D_idx=128] → topk_indices[B*T=4, 1, k=2048]
kernels.name: LightningIndexerQuant

op_data.name: LightningIndexerQuant
op_data.shape_semantic: Q[B*T=4, H_idx=64, D_idx=128] × K_cache[block=520, page=128, 1, D_idx=128] → topk_indices[B*T=4, 1, k=2048]

children.name: post_attention_layernorm
children.semantic: Fused residual add + RMSNorm + cast (AddRmsNorm/AddRmsNormCast). No quant-fusion here because MoE forks: gate uses non-quant path, shared/routed experts each apply their own DynamicQuant.

children.name: mlp
children.semantic: DeepseekV3MoE: gate routing + shared expert (parallel) + dispatch → routed_experts → combine

children.name: shared_expert
children.semantic: DeepseekV3DenseMLP shared expert (runs in parallel with routed_experts on a separate stream)

children.name: topk_routing
children.semantic: Top-k expert selection (MoeGatingTopKHash: produces per-token top-8 expert indices and weights)

kernels.shape_semantic: [B*T=4, E=256] → topk_indices[B*T=4, topK=8], topk_weights[B*T=4, topK=8], routing_hash[B*T=4, E=256]
kernels.name: MoeGatingTopKHash

op_data.name: MoeGatingTopKHash
op_data.shape_semantic: [B*T=4, E=256] → topk_indices[B*T=4, topK=8], topk_weights[B*T=4, topK=8], routing_hash[B*T=4, E=256]

children.name: dispatch
children.semantic: Distribute tokens to experts across EP ranks (MoeDistributeDispatchV2). Output groups tokens by destination expert.

kernels.shape_semantic: [B*T=4, hidden=7168] × topk[B*T=4, topK=8] × W_expert[E=256, hidden=7168] → dispatched_tokens[E_local*tokens_per_expert=512, hidden=7168]
kernels.name: MoeDistributeDispatchV2

op_data.name: MoeDistributeDispatchV2
op_data.shape_semantic: [B*T=4, hidden=7168] × topk[B*T=4, topK=8] × W_expert[E=256, hidden=7168] → dispatched_tokens[E_local*tokens_per_expert=512, hidden=7168]

children.name: routed_experts
children.semantic: Grouped batched expert computation: gate_up (GroupedMatmul) → SwiGLU → down (GroupedMatmul)

children.name: combine
children.semantic: Reduce routed expert outputs back to per-token, weighted by topk_weights; merge with shared_expert output (MoeDistributeCombineV2)

DeepseekV3MTPLayer.name: DeepseekV3MTPLayer
DeepseekV3MTPLayer.semantic: MTP (Multi-Token Prediction) iteration body: spec-token verify + weight prep (combined into preprocessing) → embed_tokens for next token + rotary lookup → enorm + hnorm → concat → eh_proj → input_layernorm → MLA self-attention (same as MoE layer) → post_attn_norm → MoE expert path → shared_head_norm (end-of-iter). Representative = iter 0 (ops 263-367). All 3 iterations are structurally identical; iter 0 includes the longer 'verify all 4 spec tokens from prev step' section while iters 1, 2 use a shorter inter-iter verify — represented here as a single layer_type with instance_indices [0,1,2] for the body; the iter-0-specific bulky verify is captured in runtime_auxiliary.spec_token_verify_main.

children.name: preprocessing
children.semantic: Inter-iteration scaffold: lm_head's verify + weight_prep happen in runtime_auxiliary; this stage covers the architectural prep (embed_tokens partial + rotary + RS) for the next token

children.name: weight_allgather
children.semantic: AllGather of newly-prepped weights for MTP

children.name: rotary_cos_gather
children.semantic: Rotary cos lookup for MTP positions

children.name: hnorm
children.semantic: Hidden-state RMSNorm (DeepseekV3ModelMTPLayer.hnorm) on previous iter / main-model output

children.name: input_layernorm
children.semantic: Standalone RMSNorm before decoder body (no past_residual fusion since eh_proj is the input)

children.name: self_attn
children.semantic: Same MLA self-attn structure as MoE decoder layer (DeepseekIndexerAttention.forward_absorb)

kernels.shape_semantic: input [B*T=4, hidden=7168] → Q_nope_abs [B*T=4, H=128, kv_rank=512], Q_rope [B*T=4, H=128, D_rope=64], KV_cache_entry [block=520, page=128, 1, 576]
kernels.name: MlaPrologV3

op_data.name: MlaPrologV3
op_data.shape_semantic: input [B*T=4, hidden=7168] → Q_nope_abs [B*T=4, H=128, kv_rank=512], Q_rope [B*T=4, H=128, D_rope=64], KV_cache_entry [block=520, page=128, 1, 576]

kernels.shape_semantic: Q[B*T=4, H_idx=64, D_idx=128] × K_cache[block=520, page=128, 1, D_idx=128] → topk_indices[B*T=4, 1, k=2048]
kernels.name: LightningIndexerQuant

op_data.name: LightningIndexerQuant
op_data.shape_semantic: Q[B*T=4, H_idx=64, D_idx=128] × K_cache[block=520, page=128, 1, D_idx=128] → topk_indices[B*T=4, 1, k=2048]

kernels.shape_semantic: Q[B*T=4, H=128, 576] × sparse_K × sparse_V × topk → [B*T=4, H=128, kv_rank=512]
kernels.name: KvQuantSparseFlashAttention

op_data.name: KvQuantSparseFlashAttention
op_data.shape_semantic: Q[B*T=4, H=128, 576] × sparse_K × sparse_V × topk → [B*T=4, H=128, kv_rank=512]

children.name: post_attention_layernorm
children.semantic: Fused residual add + RMSNorm (no quant fusion, MoE path)

children.name: mlp
children.semantic: DeepseekV3MoE (same structure as main MoE layer)

children.name: shared_down
children.semantic: Shared down projection (runs in parallel with routed_experts.gate_up on sid=180)

children.name: gate_up
children.semantic: Grouped gate+up (E_local=16, runs on sid=179 in parallel with shared expert)

children.name: shared_head_norm
children.semantic: End-of-iter fused residual add + RMSNorm before next lm_head call (DeepseekV3MTPLayer.shared_head_norm)

runtime_auxiliary.name: step_start_init
runtime_auxiliary.semantic: Step-start runtime: verify previous step's last spec-token vs main prediction (ops 0-8) + initial weight prep / online split weight UpdateModelParam_static_bin (ops 9-13) + HCCL aiv kernels for AllGather (ops 14-16)

runtime_auxiliary.name: spec_token_verify_main
runtime_auxiliary.semantic: After main-model lm_head: ArgMax over 4-token logits → spec tokens; verify against prev-step MTP candidates; build cumulative history + concat to past hidden state; broadcast acceptance count

runtime_auxiliary.name: spec_token_verify_mtp
runtime_auxiliary.semantic: Per-MTP-iter post-lm_head: ArgMax → next spec_token; short verify (single-token); weight prep + sync allReduce. Repeated after MTP iter 0 (ops 375-389) and MTP iter 1 (ops 458-473; one extra ConcatD for accumulated spec_tokens history).

runtime_auxiliary.name: final_step_sample
runtime_auxiliary.semantic: After the final (third) MTP lm_head: sample final spec_token, cast, and concatenate into the running generated_ids buffer for next step's input
